title: [MTR3/4]British Rail HST & Mark Carriage Pack
description: This resource pack adds British Rail Mark HST & Mark carriages fleet for Minecraft Transit Railway Mod.
body:
![Mark 3 with Class 43](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b62c26e426330f1b3b67c51368fd5867a555975.png)

### Description

This resource pack adds British Rail Mark 2, 3 carriages and Class 43 engine fleet.

This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway Mod** and Nemo's Transit Expansion if you using MTR 3.2 or older version.

Before using, please check the Readme included inside the pack!

### Contents

British Rail Mark 2 (Intercity, Intercity Swallow, Blue, Red, Virgin Trains livery)

British Rail Mark 3 & Class 43 {Crosscountry, Intercity swallow, Great Western Railway (FGW/Green), Chiltern}

British Pullman Carriage
